- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: Created .github/copilot-instructions.md.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Project type is a Linux sound tracker (exTracker) using C++ and CMake.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Added CMake project structure with src, include, tests, docs, and base files.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Added placeholder tracker modules: audio engine, pattern editor, and plugin host.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions required by setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Configured and built successfully using Unix Makefiles; tests pass.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and ran a VS Code build task using cmake --build build-make.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: User confirmed debug launch; app was launched under gdb and exited normally.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README exists and reflects project status; HTML comments were removed from this file.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
